atomic_route.reason: Atomic arbitrage requires a two-leg SHADOW_READY arbitrage candidate, not the one-leg smoke route.

checks.detail: A BUY plus SHADOW_READY two-leg candidate must be selected.
checks.name: two_leg_candidate_selected

checks.detail: Atomic live arbitrage cannot use the one-leg smoke route.
checks.name: not_one_leg_smoke

checks.detail: Atomic executor bytecode exists on Base.
checks.name: executor_deployed

checks.detail: Atomic executor review flag is present.
checks.name: executor_reviewed

checks.detail: USDC allowance to atomic executor is sufficient or no executable route is ready.
checks.name: executor_usdc_allowance

checks.detail: Atomic executor calldata was not built.
checks.name: atomic_calldata_built

checks.detail: Atomic executor eth_call did not pass.
checks.name: atomic_eth_call_passed

notes: This report is the final evidence gate for atomic live arbitrage.
It builds one executor transaction and simulates it with eth_call only.
No transaction is signed or broadcast by this service.
The wallet must approve USDC to the atomic executor, not just to an individual router.
